_doc: CANONICAL program state — the SINGLE source for the auto-generated status blocks. Edit THIS, then run `python3 tools/render_state.py --write` to refresh every <!-- BEGIN GENERATED:* --> block across the context docs (README, SESSION_BOOTSTRAP, SESSION_CHECKPOINT, EXPERIMENT_RUNBOOK §0.3, PROGRESS ⑤). Never hand-edit between the GENERATED markers. This is the 'generate-what's-mechanical' half of the anti-drift design (the other half = narrative fingerprints in tools/closeout_fingerprints.json). The pre-commit hook blocks commits where these blocks are stale vs this file.

current_latest: **C5 COMPACTION-VERIFY AUDIT (2026-06-25, D-C5-1; analysis, corrects a pushed over-claim).** Spec-read (§8.9/8.10/11.2/11.3/11.5/11.14) of the compaction-verify obligation R1-bit surfaced. **CORRECTION:** post-compaction verification is **spec-MANDATED**, not a gap — §11.14/C-OC3: a `CompactionProbeReport` to the TC **before Phase-2 commit**, **100% CORE / CORE=1.0-or-abort**, atomic 2PC; a CORE-diverged recompile never goes live. The earlier 'spec does not state compaction re-enters validation' is **retracted** across all artifacts. **Findings (analysis):** (A) C-OC3 by design tolerates non-CORE `behavior_fail` (≤5% SUPPORTING / ≤20% INCIDENTAL — a named §8.9/D19/D30 mode) that **nothing surfaces at read**: R1-bit's bit is tier-blind → the **R13 L1/L2 split reappears post-compaction, un-flagged** (read-surface gap; D43 is transactional-isolation not fidelity, so NO D43-wording gap; weights are a lossy serving copy per D42). (B) the non-CORE sampling (20%/floor-5, 10%/floor-3) has a **quantified detection-power deficit** near its thresholds (S=100 / true-10%: 36% false-negative; floor-dominated; reliable only at large strata / large breach); **CORE fully protected** (full census). **Prediction (NOT concluded → routed to C1-true-scale / B3N cond-3):** CORE=1.0 vs sub-batched-compaction at the 8,000-edge HARD-drift trigger (livelock) — multiply untested (engine single-solve-vs-sub-batch open; committed→CORE + N100→8000 double-extrapolation). Recs (operator-gated): surface the C-OC3 tolerance at read + a tier/freshness-marked commit-bit + lift small-stratum floors. **F1 net readiness UNCHANGED; C5 stays prototyped-not-empirical.** `docs/C5_COMPACTION_VERIFY_AUDIT.md`, `results/c5_compaction_probe_power.json`.
